suggestedRules: For municipal theater pages, try root domain first then /stadsteatern or /kultur as fallback paths

candidateRuleForC0C3.appliesTo: Swedish municipal/county government sites (region, kommun) with cultural event listings

suggestedRules: When C2 score is borderline (8-11) and event-heading is detected, try deeper extraction with adjusted scoring thresholds for educational/course sites

candidateRuleForC0C3.appliesTo: Swedish educational organizations (Studiefrämjandet, folkbildning) with subject-organized course calendars
